name: fullstack-ts-scaffold
description: Full-stack TypeScript scaffold — a Claude Code skill that generates and verifies a production-shaped Next.js + Express monorepo.

plugins.name: fullstack-ts-scaffold
plugins.description: Regenerates a production-shaped full-stack TypeScript monorepo (Next.js 15 client + Express API with three swappable DB backends, JWT rotating-refresh auth, PWA, tests, CI) and verifies it green in ~1-3 min.
